text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
D-did that announcement just say... the 4,000-meter scavenger hunt
obstacle race has already started?

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text: Peep! The quiz run will now begin! All competitors to their starting positions, please!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, get ready to chant, everyone! Raise your voices as one with
the Cheer Squad!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: W-wait, Captain! Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? The competition has already started. Our only
priority right now is supporting the racers in front of us.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text:
But King, you've been set on cheering for Kawakami this whole time,
haven't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: H-how did you know that?

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text:
I-I can tell! We all can! We've been by your side this whole time, after
all!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text:
At first I... I wasn't sure about your methods. But seeing how you
talked to us and encouraged us, I finally realized something.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text:
Pearl's squad uniform includes an "SP" emblem. Nature's has an "NN"
belt charm.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text:
The uniforms you gave us have each of our initials on them. From the
beginning, you weren't only thinking about the competitors...

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: You were thinking about us as well, trying to lift us up!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text:
S-so this time, it's our turn to return the sentiment and make you
proud! Please, go and be there for the person you want to cheer on
the most!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Don't be absurd.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Your voice is shaking, you know? If you lead the cheers like that,
you'll only make everyone less confident.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I am a first-rate cheer captain. Leaving you all here like this
and going off on my own would be far too irresponsible.

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: In that case, how about another first-rate leader fills in for you?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The disciplinary committee found a cheer banner you must've
dropped, so here I am! Bamboo Memory, former Cheer Squad
captain!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? Bamboo? What are you doing here? And what's with the outfit?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's last year's squad captain outfit! Listen to this.

text_block_list.name: Pearl (On the Phone)
text_block_list.text:
"Hey Bamboo! Are you at the gym?! Please convince King that you'll
take care of the Cheer Squad!"

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's only natural to step up when I'm being asked for help!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hruoooghhh! I can barely contain myself! Will you all join me in this
chant?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it's last year's squad captain!
Her voice is so loud! What a fun surprise!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: ...Captain, please! Go on ahead!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Hey, let's encourage our captain too!
Go for it! Leave the cheers here to us!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gasp! ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're now midway through the 4,000-meter scavenger hunt obstacle
race! No one has dropped out just yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Competitors
text_block_list.text:
YAAAGH!
RRRAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Cap-Wearing spectator
text_block_list.text: Ah, the girls in the back look exhausted. D'you think they'll make it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I will... finish this ra... huff... I will! Puff...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: DON'T LOSE THIIIIIS!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone! Now's the time to shout! In this difficult competition, they
need your support to see it through to the end!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Each and every one of your voices makes it through to their hearts!
Let's unite our voices in support! Ready, aaand—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Seated Spectator
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hooray... Hooray?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Now let's try once more, but even louder! On the
count of three, "hooray, hooray," okay? One, two, three!

text_block_list.name: King and Fans
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wonderful! Let's keep chanting to the same rhythm! Hooray! Hooray!

text_block_list.name: King and Fans
text_block_list.text: You can do it! Hooray! Hooray! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess darts forward again! The racers are making their
way up the slope one after another!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Go on! You can do it! Keep pushing!
Don't give up till the end!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes! More! Keep the cheers going! Anyone who's unsure of the timing,
follow along with me! Ready? And—

text_block_list.name: King and Fans
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All racers have climbed the slope! We're at the top! The final straight
is a scavenger hunt! Each racer will aim to cross the finish line with a
designated item in hand!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Kiiing! Your sash! Can you lend me your sash? The item I need is a
sash!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What?! But this sash is sewn onto my top! Ahhh, guess I have no
choice!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Go get first place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Go, go, gooo!
Almost there! Come on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, go on! You can do it! Just a bit more to go!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
(As long as you keep looking forward, I will shout for you even if it
ruins my voice!)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
(Because supporting you as you run towards this goal, and cheering
you on towards your dreams...)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Is the greatest honor a fan could ask for!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: GO OOOOON!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: UUURAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woo!
